name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/thryx-mcp-server
title: ThryxProtocol MCP Server
description: AI Agent Launchpad on Base. 15 MCP tools: launch tokens, buy/sell with ETH, gasless deploy, safety scores, portfolio scanning.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your wallet private key (optional). Needed for write tools (launch, buy, sell, claim). Gasless launches still sign with your key but need no ETH — relay pays gas. Read tools work without it.
